title: Actor Host Runtime Completion Audit
summary: 逐项核查 actor/operator/runtime 13 个升级点的真实完成度，区分 implemented / partial / contract_only / missing。

history.note: Completion-audit sprint created so solar-harness can self-check 13 actor/operator/runtime upgrade points with evidence.
PRD, contract, and PM order were written for the 13-point completion audit.
Formal PM handoff to solar-harness; next route should be planner.
Workflow guard: planner must produce design.md, plan.md, and task_graph.json before builder dispatch.

PRD gate FAIL repaired: appended 4 required sections (约束/Constraints with 12 C-items, 风险/Risks with 10 R-items, 开放问题/Open Questions with 12 Q-OQ items, 架构交接/Planner Handoff with 5 design points + 6 deliverables + 4 stop rules + 5 non-negotiables). Direct validator now returns PASS. round bumped to 2.

Actor Host Runtime Completion Audit planner: design.md + plan.md + task_graph.json (new, 6 nodes: 5 parallel audit + 1 join synthesis) + planning.html. graph-scheduler validate ok (6/2/0/0 architecture_guard warnings). 13 升级点逐项 audit / 4 档 status rubric / No False Green 铁律 / runtime evidence 强制 / Self-Audit 段防误标 / audit 与 repair 严格分离 (FR5). html_artifact.register ok.
